basics.name: Vinit Sutar
basics.title: Data Science Researcher & LLM Specialist
basics.summary: Data Science Researcher specializing in building scalable LLM applications and delivering high-impact business solutions through multi-agent systems. 5+ years of experience driving ₹520 Crores in revenue impact across fintech, manufacturing, and analytics domains.

highlights: Led team for Propensity Models, Delinquency Modelling, SMS Engine, LLM Fine-tuning, FD Cohorts, Market Mix Modelling
Increased FD conversions by ₹520 Crores through improved propensity models
Implemented Market Mix Modelling optimizing campaigns to save 5% on marketing spend
Engineered RAG pipeline on Azure Databricks with HNSW indexing for vector search
Enabled Tool Calling capabilities with Gemma 3 for precise information retrieval
Developed conversion attribution model using GLMNET and Logistic Regression for South Africa Region (98% accuracy)
Implemented conversion package to calculate incremental lift with model error ±5%
Implemented 2^(n-1) fractional factorial design halving time for Randomized Control Trials
Developed propensity score matching using DTW, LSH, and FAISS for 200k stores
Modernised Prophet pipeline improving regression model accuracy by 3%
Developed imputation logic improving accuracy from 0.3% to 0.7%
Designed store clustering pipeline using Dynamic Time Warping
Mentored team of two in client and process knowledge transfer
Improved micro-organism detection accuracy by 40% using OpenCV
Developed annotation pipeline using Raspberry Pi + CMOS camera saving ₹80/image for 500 images
Implemented Active Learning using Mask R-CNN saving ₹6,00,000 in annotation costs
Saved ₹1,00,000 in instrument costs while increasing accuracy from 80% to 94%

projects.name: Enterprise RAG Pipeline with Tool Calling
projects.description: High-scale RAG pipeline on Azure Databricks with HNSW indexing, enabling Tool Calling capabilities with Gemma 3 for precise information retrieval.
projects.impact: 10,000+ daily queries with <2s response time, 94% accuracy
projects.details: Built hybrid RAG system combining dense vector retrieval with structured tool calling. Implemented query classification, document ingestion pipeline processing 50,000+ documents, and Gemma 3 integration for intelligent response generation.

projects.name: Propensity Models for FD Products
projects.description: ML-powered propensity scoring and campaign optimization driving incremental FD conversions.
projects.impact: ₹520 Crores incremental revenue, 5% marketing cost savings
projects.details: Led team to build end-to-end propensity modeling system with 247 engineered features. Implemented Bayesian Market Mix Modelling for channel attribution. Achieved 312% conversion lift and 78% reduction in cost per acquisition.

projects.name: Auto-Annotation Pipeline
projects.description: Active Learning approach using Mask R-CNN to reduce manual annotation efforts.
projects.details: Implemented sophisticated data engineering pipeline for expert-verified Instance Segmentation. Used Active Learning to intelligently select samples for annotation, dramatically reducing labeling effort while maintaining high model quality.

projects.name: Micro-organism Identification
projects.description: Detection pipeline to count and calculate growth rate of micro-organisms.
projects.details: Developed computer vision pipeline replacing expensive hardware with software solution. Improved detection accuracy by 40% compared to existing algorithms.

projects.name: Unsloth: Kernel Anatomy
projects.description: Deep dive into custom Triton kernels for LLM optimization.
projects.impact: 2x faster LLM training with reduced VRAM usage
projects.details: Technical analysis of how Unsloth's custom Triton kernels bypass memory bottlenecks in transformer training. Explored forward/backward pass optimizations and memory-efficient attention mechanisms.

projects.name: Conversion Attribution Model
projects.description: Multi-touch attribution for South Africa region marketing
projects.impact: 98% accuracy, fractional factorial RCTs halving experiment time
projects.details: Built attribution model using GLMNET for feature selection and regularized logistic regression. Implemented propensity score matching with DTW and LSH for 200k stores.

projects.name: Store Clustering & Forecasting
projects.description: Modernized forecasting pipelines with improved accuracy
projects.details: Redesigned forecasting pipeline with trend extraction from hierarchies. Developed novel imputation logic and store clustering using time-aware DTW.
